creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 209977
svn diff to upgrade to 0.61.0

gohugo has been updated to 0.61.0
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.61.0)

Change log:
Mostly a bug fix release, and an important note is the deprecation of Amber and Ace as template engines.

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.3-RELEASE, 11.3-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.1-RELEASE, 12.1-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
